zh.lifeSummary: 當David Mathew於1425年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根澤德時，他的父親Sir Dafydd ap Mathew25歲，母親Gwenllian verch Dafydd26歲。他於1440年之前與Margaret Agnes de Gamage在威爾士結婚。他去世於1461年3月29日在英國越可爾塔德卡斯特享年36歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾紐波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Mathew于1425年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根澤德时，他的父亲Sir Dafydd ap Mathew25岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Dafydd26岁。他于1440年之前与Margaret Agnes de Gamage在威尔士结婚。他去世于1461年3月29日在英国越可爾塔德卡斯特享年36岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾紐波特。

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Mathai, Babu, Oommen, Saji, Varughese, Raju, Reji, Sunil, Prakash, Prasad, Shaji, Cheriyan.
English and Scottish: variant of Matthew . Mathew is common as a personal name among Christians in South India, and was registered as a surname after their immigration to the US.

variants.name: Mathews
meanings: English: patronymic from   Mathew  ; a variant of   Matthews  . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages.

History: Among the earliest bearers of the name in North America was Samuel Mathews (c. 1600–c. 1657), who came to VA from London c. 1618. He established a plantation at the mouth of the Warwick River, which was at first called Mathews Manor; later its name was changed to Denbigh. He was one of the most powerful and influential men in the early affairs of the colony. He (or possibly his son, who bore the same name) was governor of the colony from 1657 until his death in 1660.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When David Mathew was born in 1425, in Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Sir Dafydd ap Mathew, was 25 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Dafydd, was 26. He married Margaret Agnes de Gamage before 1440, in Wales. He died on 29 March 1461, in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Newport, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Mathew est né en 1425, à Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Sir Dafydd ap Mathew, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Dafydd, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Agnes de Gamage avant 1440, à Galles. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1461, à Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Newport, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Mathew 1425 in Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Dafydd ap Mathew 25 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Dafydd 26. Er hat vor 1440 in Wales Margaret Agnes de Gamage geheiratet. Er starb am 29. März 1461 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Newport, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Mathew è nato il nel 1425 nel Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Dafydd ap Mathew, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Dafydd, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Agnes de Gamage prima del 1440, nel Galles. Morì il 29 marzo 1461, nel Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Newport, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: David Mathew(이)가 1425년 웨일스 글램르건 센게이니드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Dafydd ap Mathew(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Dafydd(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1440년 이전 웨일스에서 Margaret Agnes de Gamage(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1461년 3월 29일 영국 요르크실르 타드카스터에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 뉴포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Mathew nasceu em 1425, em Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Sir Dafydd ap Mathew, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Dafydd, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Agnes de Gamage antes 1440, em Gales. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1461, em Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Newport, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Mathew родился в 1425 г. в местности сеньхенидд, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Dafydd ap Mathew было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Dafydd, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Agnes de Gamage перед 1440 г. в местности Уэльс. Он умер 29 марта 1461 г. в местности тадкастир, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности нюпорт, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Mathew nació en 1425, en Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Sir Dafydd ap Mathew, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Dafydd, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Agnes de Gamage antes de 1440, en Gales. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1461, en Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Newport, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
